description: Allowlist for test_arch_goal_gate.py Gate A. Exempts findings that match the GOAL's explicitly-allowed patterns: device construction/detection/registration at the composition root, legitimate process-wide singletons/caches (NOT config freezes), and construction-time capability decisions ('构造期由类型化 capability/placement 决策一次'). The `contains` field pins an entry to a specific line so a file with both a legit item and a real migration target only exempts the legit one. Hot-path env reads, config-freeze OnceLocks, and decode/prefill supports_*() BEHAVIOR branches are NOT exempt — they migrate.

entries.reason: Backend/device registration composition root: must branch on cuda/metal to register the right backend and enumerate devices.
entries.review_condition: Re-review if registration moves out of registry.rs.

entries.reason: Maps Device enum to a concrete candle Device. Device construction is platform-specific by nature.
entries.review_condition: Re-review if tensor-factory device construction is unified behind a resolver.

entries.reason: Device detection/enumeration. Platform-specific; sits below the model abstraction.
entries.review_condition: Re-review if device detection moves to the kernels crate.

entries.reason: GLOBAL_REGISTRY is a process-wide component-registry singleton, not an env-config freeze. Legitimate global state.
entries.review_condition: Re-review if the component registry is injected instead of a global.

entries.reason: TOKEN_POLICY_CACHE memoizes per-(tokenizer,vocab) forbidden-token sets — a pure computation cache, not config. Keyed, so it holds many entries, not one frozen config.
entries.review_condition: Re-review if token-policy computation moves out of the engine.

entries.reason: GLOBAL_DEVICE_MANAGER is a process-wide device-manager singleton (device init), not an env-config freeze.
entries.review_condition: Re-review if device management is injected.

entries.reason: Construction-time KV-pool setup: chooses paged-KV layout from B::supports_paged_kv() once, when the model's KV state is built. GOAL allows construction-time capability decisions.
entries.review_condition: Re-review if KV setup moves into the decode hot path.

entries.reason: Load-time scratch sizing: sizes initial scratch from B::supports_varlen_qkv() during model construction. GOAL allows construction-time capability decisions.
entries.review_condition: Re-review if scratch sizing moves into the forward path.

entries.reason: Construction-time placement validation: checks device-ordinal-scope support once when building the layer-split pipeline placement.
entries.review_condition: Re-review if placement validation moves into the forward path.
